title: JavaScript Runtime, Tooling, and Evidence
description: Trace a small service-status script from source through parsing, execution, console evidence, and a user-visible result. Learners cumulatively produce a reproducible service-status runtime notebook through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Distinguish ECMAScript language behavior from browser, worker, and server host APIs.
Trace source parsing, module instantiation, execution contexts, jobs, and observable output.
Use console evidence, breakpoints, scope inspection, watch expressions, and stack traces without relying on logging alone.
